title: lobelia cavanillesii
intro: Lobelia cavanillesii, also known as the Spanish lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia cavanillesii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia cavanillesii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
